fileTabs.content: SELECT /*+ parallel(C) parallel(P) use_hash(C P) */         DISTINCT C.CLID,         P.CUSTOMER_NUMBER FROM         CLIENT_ALIAS C,         WORK_CARDS_ORIG_STAGING P WHERE         ltrim(rtrim(C.SOURCE_CLIENT_REF(+))) = ltrim(rtrim(P.CUSTOMER_NUMBER)) AND     C.ETO (+) IS NULL AND     C.SOURCE_TYPE (+) = 0 AND     C.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE (+) = 'U' AND     C.CLASS (+) = '585' AND     P.CUSTOMER_NUMBER IS NOT NULL

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN CAST(((CASE WHEN ((SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST)) = 1) THEN BUSINESS_DATE_STRING__FIND_BUSINESS_DATE_LKP_1 ELSE CAST(NULL AS STRING) END) IS NULL) AS BOOL) THEN (ERROR('No Business Date found on dbattribute')) ELSE (PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y%m%d', CAST(SUBSTRING((CASE WHEN ((SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST)) = 1) THEN BUSINESS_DATE_STRING__FIND_BUSINESS_DATE_LKP_1 ELSE CAST(NULL AS STRING) END) , 0 , 8) AS STRING))) END)
